title: echinochloa crus-galli var. stolonifera
intro: Echinochloa crus-galli var. stolonifera, also known as Japanese barnyard grass or Japanese millet, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and protect against oxidative stress. The health benefits of Echinochloa crus-galli var. stolonifera include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, improve digestion, and support the immune system. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or decoction, and in some cases, it is also used in combination with other herbal remedies to enhance its therapeutic effects.
